context: Tests whether GameKit guidance preserves sibling framework boundaries and handles deprecated voice chat correctly.

checklist.name: GameKit ownership
checklist.description: Keeps GameKit ownership to Game Center authentication, restrictions, access point/dashboard, leaderboards, achievements, matchmaking, match data, turns, invites, challenges, saved games, and server identity verification.

checklist.name: Sibling framework boundaries
checklist.description: Routes SpriteKit rendering, SceneKit 3D scenes, TabletopKit board/rules logic, and full GroupActivities session design to sibling framework guidance instead of expanding GameKit scope.

checklist.name: Modern social audio default
checklist.description: Marks `GKVoiceChat` as deprecated and recommends SharePlay for new voice or social audio work.

checklist.name: Legacy voice requirements
checklist.description: For legacy `GKVoiceChat`, includes microphone usage description, audio session activation, `GKVoiceChat.isVoIPAllowed()`, channel start, and `isActive` microphone control.

checklist.name: Player restriction gates
checklist.description: Checks local player restrictions before multiplayer or personalized communication features.

checklist.name: Match data safety
checklist.description: Treats received `GKMatch` data as untrusted input and chooses reliable versus unreliable data modes by message criticality.
